.. change::
    :tags: usecase, sql
    :tickets: 8130

    Added :meth:`_sql.Delete.using`, allowing explicit FROM expressions such as
    joins to be rendered in backend-specific multiple-table DELETE forms
    including MySQL/MariaDB ``DELETE .. USING``.  Pull request courtesy
    cjc0013.

    .. seealso::

        :ref:`change_8130`
